programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe, Lenny and Carl win the lottery, but Carl runs off to Iceland with the winnings.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: While she's browsing for wedding anniversary cakes, Marge stumbles across a website for married people who want to have affairs.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart doesn't want to go to piano lessons, until he meets his beautiful teacher... Homer loses the last two hairs on his head.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch Friday's new episode, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A nervous Diane tries to create a good impression when she meets Frasier's mum Hester. But Hester gives Diane some dire warnings..

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla's ex-husband Nick returns with his new bride, demanding custody of their eldest son. And everyone's shocked when Carla agrees to the request.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: After moving in with Frasier, Diane develops a chronic allergy that she thinks is caused by his dog. But is her reaction psychosomatic.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's traffic school students are bored by his class, so he introduces Traffic Cop Timmy, a puppet who's anything but boring.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes concerned with his own mortality when he discovers that he's shrunk a quarter of an inch and is no longer six feet tall.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's shocked when Debra takes all their baby stuff to a garage sale. He didn't know that they'd decided not to have any more children.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles enjoy the plush comforts of Seattle's premier spa and are happy with their pampering - until they discover there's a 'Gold Level'.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Tension mounts when Frasier's forced to share his studio and airtime with the station's new finance reporter, an arrogant ex-stock market analyst.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith pays an unexpected visit to Seattle and tells Frasier that she would like another child through artificial insemination.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a very special dinner party to mark the purchase of a new painting he's bought for Daphne. But catastrophe ensues.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Can Gordon Ramsay get two brothers to work through their problems and save their failing New York diner.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Birmingham, Henry Cole stumbles upon a model metal tipper truck which he's convinced will make money.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers bring Bowes Museum's marvellous mechanical swan back to life, and relive fond family memories at High Force waterfall.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carpenter David from Suffolk wants an apartment near the beach in Abruzzo on Italy's east coast. Craig Rowe shows him what his £45,000 can buy.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Gîte owners Mark and Lesley take flight with a new idea over a Normandy beach. Fitness instructor Ali sets sail on a new adventure.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB race to light up their salon. Anna and Edward rebuild their lake's sweeping stairway. Christina and Sassan transform their grand front gates.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: A new series with our favourite family-run estate agents. In Almería, the Garners juggle wow-factor villas and a wildcard. Lisa and John face tough compromises on the Costa Blanca.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Ruby-Rose is ready to level up from dog sitting to a dog of her own. Could a cheeky Yorkie be the one? And will ex-cabbie Danny give Bella the Border collie a lift.

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: The dramatic inside story of 6 November 1956, the final day of the 1956 Suez Crisis. A day that changed Britain forever, exactly as it happened.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: On 26 April 1986, a huge explosion rocked Chernobyl nuclear power plant. Witnesses and survivors tell the story of the world's worst nuclear accident.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: The Chernobyl explosion left wreckage that will be radioactive for 20,000 years. But what caused it? And can Chernobyl ever be made safe.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time the celebs watch Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise and Millionaire Hoarders.

programme.title: Grayson Perry Has Seen the Future
programme.desc: Artist Sir Grayson Perry visits Silicon Valley to understand how AI and robotics will shape all of our futures in a series that raises profound questions about what it is to be human.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits a family-owned Italian in Michigan, run by a father and son who constantly clash. Can he get the restaurant - and the family - back on track.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George Clarke meets a man who's trying to build a UFO-style house from a 1960s design icon, and a woman who's making a garden room using material including earth, straw and human hair.

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: An insight into one of the world's largest luxury estate agencies, UK Sotheby's International Realty. The brokers view a 40-acre mega mansion for a millionaire client.

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Japanese prisons have become retirement homes for a rising number of elderly convicts. Krishnan Guru-Murthy investigates the country's geriatric crime wave.

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. She takes on food-inspired crafts by creating vegetable-printed cards and salt dough trinket dishes.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: As Frankie prepares to leave the village, the Keanes get ready to surprise their estranged family by moving to Hollyoaks. But in a devastating twist of fate, things spiral out of control..

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: After a health scare, Norm decides that it's time to give up his old life and move to Bora Bora. Will he go through with it.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's flirtation with Diane's friend Amanda lands him in trouble when she becomes obsessive about their romance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier's esteemed colleague Dr Ludlow meets Carla, falls in love with her and proposes marriage in a whirlwind romance. But Carla has a surprise up her sleeve.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray makes the mistake of asking Debra why she married him, rekindling memories of his proposal and his fears that she felt pressured into agreeing.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reminisces about his wedding, when he worried that Debra was more interested in the big day than she was in her groom.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray moves his family into his parents' house when the termite exterminators visit. And Debra takes the opportunity to turn the tables on her in-laws.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier asks a gym coach to team up with him for a squash tournament, then develops a massive crush on her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are volunteered to participate in a bike-a-thon for AIDS research. Unfortunately, neither of them can ride a bike..

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's jealous when his depressed station manager finds more comfort in Martin's advice than Frasier's psychiatry. Niles and Daphne study yoga.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers find their social influence growing, thanks to a Russian backstreet caviar dealer.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Six-month-old gastropub Bask 46 is in jeopardy due to its fiery head chef. Can Gordon transform it.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Leicestershire, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Bernadette, whose uncle Jim has filled every room in his house with motorbikes, cycles and everything under the sun.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers explore the Ford and Etal estates, meet a lord and his rare four-horned Hebridean sheep, and help out at one of the UK's few working watermills.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Debbie are dreaming of a two-bedroom home that could one day become their permanent residence on the Costa Cálida in Spain. Lucy Alexander shows them what their money can buy.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Will Rob and Steve's new events pay off at their French vineyard? There's a shock departure at Gary and Lynne's padel tennis club.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha get their courtyard wedding-ready. Anna and Edward spruce up their roof ready for a wine weekend. Roger and Louisa create a new ensuite.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help Jill and Dene find the perfect balance of comfort and outdoor living. In Murcia, the Browns hunt for a villa for Paul and Bobbie's blended family.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith and Marj turn their attention to their eclectic entrance lobby. Marj refurbishes an old metal locker, while Keith mounts antlers to bring some baronial flair.

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: The dramatic inside story of how the Suez Crisis triggered a global crisis, felled a Prime Minister and ended Britain's dominance as a super-power.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service: Mrs
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with help from a secret insider. Can he help a soul-food café and its 101-year-old boss.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The case of the brutal murder of 86-year-old Una Crown in 2013 is re-opened. Police think they know the killer but will the science back them up.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Forensics get a partial DNA match to a previous suspect, and officers bring him in for questioning. After 13 years of denial will he finally confess.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A decorator's had a nasty fall and may have a bleed on the brain. A motorcyclist is given ketamine after breaking a leg. And Doreen has been trampled by a foal.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay takes on a time warp at the Handlebar restaurant and lounge in Mount Sinai, New York, where the owners are stuck in the 80s with an unenthusiastic chef.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: The comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West returns. Maggie and Eddie haven't spoken for a year, until they're reunited as bridesmaids at a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. Maggie and Whitney lock horns over Eddie's affection as they go on an odyssey across London to secure tickets to a drag show.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Greater Manchester, there are chaotic kitchens, couples' karaoke, army commands and a charm offensive, as three couples compete to host the best dinner party.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: Up a long garden path in Leeds lies a Victorian villa that's been a labour of love for Jawad and Charlie. And in Brixton, George hopes for a clean sweep with a redundant chimney.
